plan_text:
SESSION OPEN PLAN — agent=ai_fleet_skills — ZCT report (read before first reply)

1. INBOX: actionable≈0 — ids=[]
2. MANDATORY: thread=fleet-mandatory-obedience-20260703 flags=[]
3. COMPLIANCE: light=gray score=40 alerts=[]
4. PARK next: (none)
5. LAST SUBMIT: (none) hints=[]

MERGE RULE: inbox actionable > fleet-mandatory > park > last SUBMIT > prior agent suggestion

FIRST REPLY MUST:
  - State PLAN (this turn tasks + verify cmds)
  - MTM: prework.py + ztm-task-router.py BEFORE 2nd Read/Shell on same topic
6. PFKT: stamp=pfkt_ai_fleet_skills active_fid=f2 — work → verify-done before 完成/shipped claim
   done: python %AI_WORKSPACE%\_skill\engines\pfkt-fragment.py done f2 --stamp pfkt_ai_fleet_skills --evidence <proof>
  - EXECUTE highest-priority actionable → verify → ack
  - SUBMIT on milestone; NO 'next steps' while inbox actionable>0

FORBIDDEN: skip pickup · auto-ack without work · suggest next before inbox drain

══ MTM + goal-compact (MANDATORY — _registry/ztm-enforce.json) ══
